form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 40 days. First-up 10th of 14 at Durbanville on January 21 over 1250m, 11 len behind Raffish Trend with 49kg at $26. Second-up 7th of 12 at this track on February 25 over 1600m, 8 len behind April Fools' Day with 60kg at $101. Fully tested on her recent run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide on the turn and into the straight.
Bumped Clouds Clearing leaving the stalls and thereafter slow into stride.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 3rd of 8 at Durbanville on March 21 over 1600m, 0.9 len behind Miss Attitude with 60.5kg at $3.30. The start before that 4th of 9 at Durbanville on February 11 over 1800m, 3 len behind Loui's Star carrying 61kg at $6.50. Leading player.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 40-day let-up. Last start second last of 12 at this track on February 25 over 1600m, 20 len behind April Fools' Day carrying 60kg at $101. Before that ran last of 11 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1400m, 12 len behind Peaches And Cream carrying 60kg at $151. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

Before that ran last of 11 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1400m, 12 len behind Peaches And Cream carrying 60kg at $151. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide without cover until passing the 900m.

form.formComment: Most recently 7th of 9 at Durbanville on March 21 over 1600m, 6 len behind Lady Orbit with 56.5kg at $8.50. Before that 2nd of 9 at Durbanville on March 4 over 1400m, 3 len behind Vivo Per Lei with 60kg at $26. Can do a lot better than that last run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped slow, losing one length. Pulled hard in the early and middle stages.
Jumped slow, losing one length and thereafter slow into stride.

form.formComment: Last start 6th of 8 at Durbanville on March 21 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Miss Attitude with 54.5kg at $26. The race before that 9th of 11 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1400m, 8 len behind Peaches And Cream carrying 60kg at $151. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 4th of 9 at Durbanville on March 4 over 1400m, 4 len behind Vivo Per Lei carrying 56.3kg at $17. form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At very long odds at debut, 7th of 10 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1250m, 5.5 len behind Ebisu with 60kg at $67. Last start 7th of 9 at Durbanville on March 4 over 1400m, 8 len behind Vivo Per Lei with 60kg at $15. Should be right in the finish.
